summary.title: A mix of private case studies, public experiments, and product-minded builds.
summary.description: The strongest applied AI work often happens inside private operating environments, so this page combines representative enterprise outcomes with public code that shows how I think and build.

1.title: Network Forecasting Platform
1.description: Redesigned large-scale forecasting across a fulfillment network where locations, products, promotions, and inventory patterns changed constantly.
1.impact: Improved site-level forecast error from 30%+ to under 15% while supporting downstream operational planning.

2.title: Real-Time Pricing and Tender Intelligence
2.description: Built and improved pricing systems used in live shipment workflows where latency, uptime, and interpretability all mattered.
2.impact: Matched best-ensemble performance with a compact model design based on five common shipment inputs.

3.title: Recommendation Systems With Explainability
3.description: Improved recommendation workflows and paired them with explanations that gave end users more confidence in model-driven suggestions.
3.impact: Helped turn model output into usable sales and operational decisions instead of opaque predictions.

4.title: Crypto Market Intelligence App
4.description: A Streamlit application that consumes and caches live market data, visualizes historical price movement, and compares technical and statistical forecasts.
4.impact: A compact example of end-to-end product thinking across data ingestion, modeling, and UX.

5.title: Book Recommender
5.description: Recommendation engine work built from the Goodreads UCSD dataset, exploring practical ranking and user preference signals.
5.impact: A simple public artifact that mirrors my longer-running interest in recommendation and decision support systems.

6.title: Portfolio Platform
6.description: This site itself: a lightweight Flask application that presents consulting positioning, structured SEO metadata, and a modern profile for AI/ML work.
6.impact: Designed to communicate clearly with both human buyers and search crawlers while staying easy to maintain.
